title: Brit Milah (Circumcision): The Covenant in the Flesh
title_zh: 割礼(Brit Milah):刻在肉身上的盟约
description: A comprehensive guide to brit milah (Jewish circumcision), exploring its biblical origins, spiritual significance, medical aspects, and historical continuity as the physical sign of the eternal covenant between God and the Jewish people.

sources.author: Maimonides (Rambam)
sources.work: Guide for the Perplexed and Mishneh Torah

sources.topic: Laws and traditions of brit milah

target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior Jewish knowledge
cultural_parallels: Mǎnyuè (满月) - Chinese one-month celebration ceremony
Zhuāzhōu (抓周) - Chinese first birthday ceremony
Life passage rituals in Chinese tradition
key_concepts: Connection to Abraham and future generations
